description: Domain architecture comparison of PTHR43828 family members showing YAR1 lacks DNA-binding domains
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 8), gridspec_kw={'hspace': 0.6})

# Color scheme
colors = {
    'HTH_APSES': '#E74C3C',  # Red - DNA binding
    'ANK': '#3498DB',         # Blue - ankyrin repeats
    'Swi6_N': '#2ECC71',     # Green - Swi6-specific
    'backbone': '#BDC3C7',   # Grey
    'PEST': '#F39C12',       # Orange - PEST/acidic
}

proteins = [
    {
        'name': 'SWI4 (1093 aa)\nDNA-binding TF (SBF)',
        'length': 1093,
        'domains': [
            (37, 147, 'HTH_APSES', 'HTH APSES\n(DNA binding)'),
            (520, 549, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
            (641, 670, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
        ],
        'has_dna_binding': True,
        'subfamily': 'SF7'
    },
    {
        'name': 'MBP1 (833 aa)\nDNA-binding TF (MBF)',
        'length': 833,
        'domains': [
            (5, 111, 'HTH_APSES', 'HTH APSES\n(DNA binding)'),
            (394, 423, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
            (512, 541, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
        ],
        'has_dna_binding': True,
        'subfamily': 'SF15'
    },
    {
        'name': 'SWI6 (803 aa)\nTF co-activator (SBF+MBF)',
        'length': 803,
        'domains': [
            (1, 200, 'Swi6_N', 'Swi6_N'),
            (318, 346, 'ANK', ''),
            (347, 383, 'ANK', ''),
            (384, 469, 'ANK', 'ANK×5'),
            (470, 498, 'ANK', ''),
            (499, 514, 'ANK', ''),
        ],
        'has_dna_binding': False,
        'subfamily': 'SF3'
    },
    {
        'name': 'YAR1 (200 aa)\nRps3 chaperone',
        'length': 200,
        'domains': [
            (49, 78, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
            (92, 121, 'ANK', 'ANK'),
            (152, 200, 'PEST', 'Acidic/PEST'),
        ],
        'has_dna_binding': False,
        'subfamily': 'SF10'
    },
]

max_len = max(p['length'] for p in proteins)

for idx, protein in enumerate(proteins):
    ax = axes[idx]
    ax.set_xlim(0, max_len + 100)
    ax.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)
    ax.set_yticks([])
    
    # Draw backbone
    ax.barh(0.5, protein['length'], height=0.3, color=colors['backbone'], 
            edgecolor='#95A5A6', linewidth=1, left=0)
    
    # Draw domains
    for start, end, domain_type, label in protein['domains']:
        width = end - start
        ax.barh(0.5, width, height=0.5, color=colors[domain_type],
                edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, left=start, alpha=0.85)
        if label:
            ax.text((start + end) / 2, 0.5, label, ha='center', va='center',
                   fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
    # Add protein name
    ax.text(-5, 0.5, protein['name'], ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9,
           fontweight='bold', fontfamily='monospace')
    
    # Add PANTHER subfamily
    ax.text(protein['length'] + 10, 0.5, f"PTHR43828:{protein['subfamily']}",
           ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, color='#7F8C8D', style='italic')
    
    # Highlight missing DNA-binding domain
    if not protein['has_dna_binding']:
        ax.text(protein['length'] + 10, 1.0, "⚠ No DNA-binding domain",
               ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')
    else:
        ax.text(protein['length'] + 10, 1.0, "✓ Has DNA-binding domain",
               ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    
    ax.set_xlim(-250, max_len + 250)
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['bottom'].set_visible(False)
    ax.set_xticks([])

# Title
fig.suptitle('Domain Architecture: PANTHER Family PTHR43828\nYAR1 lacks the HTH APSES DNA-binding domain present in SWI4/MBP1',
            fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['HTH_APSES'], edgecolor='black', label='HTH APSES (DNA-binding)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['ANK'], edgecolor='black', label='Ankyrin repeats (protein-protein)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['Swi6_N'], edgecolor='black', label='Swi6_N domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['PEST'], edgecolor='black', label='Acidic/PEST region'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['backbone'], edgecolor='black', label='Backbone'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=5, fontsize=8,
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0.22, 0.04, 1, 0.95])
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain architecture figure saved.")
